title: helminthotheca algarbiensis
intro: Helminthotheca algarbiensis, also known as the Algarve helminthotheca or Spanish needles, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Helminthotheca algarbiensis include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its leaves and flowers, which can be used as teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
